privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated set of Chrome bookmarks, including specific junk domains (ign.com, draftkings.com, netflix.com, store.steampowered.com, espn.com, reddit.com, twitch.tv, hulu.com) injected via setup_task.sh. It requires creating specific operational bookmark folders ('Weather & Forecasting', 'SCADA Control', 'OEM Manuals', 'Safety & LOTO') and updating Chrome Preferences to enforce a default font size of 22 and minimum size of 16. The task also specifies internal Chrome flags ('enable-offline-auto-reload@1', 'enable-quic@2', 'smooth-scrolling@2') to be configured, and two custom search engines. The final PDF is verified to be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Field_Safety/LOTO_procedure_2026.pdf'. All these parameters precisely match the setup scripts, the instructions generated in field_laptop_spec.txt, and the constraints enforced by verifier.py.
